'''''Second Death''''' was a unique vessel constructed from the remains of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Razor's Kiss]]''.

==History==
{{Quote|Ugliest ship I think I've ever seen. Melvar, you have done a magnificent job.|Warlord [[Zsinj]], upon first seeing the ''Second Death''|<ref name="X-Wing: Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>}}
After ''Razor's Kiss'' was destroyed in the [[Battle for the Razor's Kiss]], [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] ordered his forces to collect the scattered debris of the massive warship. Even his second in command, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Melvar]], was mystified as to why valuable resources were being expended on such a seemingly pointless task. It was not until after the recovery operation was completed that Zsinj revealed his plan. He then ordered the construction of a new ship from the debris, painted with all of [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'''s]] markings. The ship was constructed with an experimental [[Orbital nightcloak|nightcloak]] function and three [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]] for the use of its skeleton crew. The ship itself did not have the length of Iron Fist, being only 3,000 meters long and did have an oval design with the pointy bow present on many of Kuat Drive Yards' designs.

Though enormous, ''Second Death'' lacked both armament and shields. Its sole purpose was to allow Zsinj to, if the need arose, present the illusion that his infamous [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] had been destroyed. The ship was used for that purpose shortly after its construction, at the [[Battle of Selaggis]]. When Zsinj realized he was in danger of being overwhelmed by General [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Solo Fleet|fleet]], ''Second Death'' was called to [[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis]] with its nightcloak activated. ''Iron Fist'' entered the nightcloak and jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], undetected by Solo's fleet, while ''Second Death'' self-destructed.

At least one [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] pilot, [[Tetengo Noor]], flew into the nightcloak at Selaggis and saw ''Second Death'', noticing markings that identified the ship as ''Iron Fist'' and thus revealing its purpose. Noor and his [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] were caught in the blast of its self-destruct before he could report his discovery. A number of New Republic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] including those from [[Polearm Squadron]] were similarly destroyed in the blast.

''Second Death''{{'s}} destruction produced debris which appeared to be the remains of ''Iron Fist''. Zsinj completed the illusion by contacting Solo via holocomm, appearing defeated and enraged, and roundly cursing Solo for costing him so dearly. Solo's hunt for the Star Dreadnought was therefore ended. ''Iron Fist'' would not be seen again until it appeared in orbit over [[Dathomir]] to confront Solo.
